first_vertical_slice.name: Complete the primary user action through validation, business logic, persistence, feedback, logging, and automated tests.

product.goals: Deliver the smallest useful end-to-end workflow; establish reliable feedback loops.
product.non_goals: Premature scale work; broad rewrites unrelated to the first validated workflow.
product.problem: The underlying problem needs project-specific evidence and validation.

project.name: PPC Companion
